case_title: MICHAEL HARRINGTON VS. EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRINGTON, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL HARRINGTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NADIA REYNAGA MERNO LEGAL SUPPORT LEAD. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRINGTON, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC. $1,230.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HARRINGTON, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-24-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.
